biasCorrect3M.note: Only pivots >12M before today. Scraping-time fundamentals are maximally stale here → minimal look-ahead lift.

AGGREGATE_STATS.note_lookahead: Fundamental data (analyst targets, EPS revision) is from scraping date, not pivot date. Partial look-ahead bias inherent to static fixture approach.
AGGREGATE_STATS.note_overlap: Weekly pivots with 3M forward window: ~12x overlap. Basket IR inflated (eff. DoF ≈ n/12). IC statistics (cross-sectional Spearman) are overlap-robust and the primary validity measure.

taOnlyFloor3M.note: Clean floor: taComposite+relativePe+vol enrichment+FF alpha only. No analyst targets, no EPS revision.

epsSurprise3M.note: Point-In-Time EPS: actual beat/miss from EODHD evaluated exactly at each pivot date (bias-free).

epsEdgar3M.note: Bias-free: EDGAR SEC-filed YoY EPS growth as-of-pivot (filed <= pivotDate). US only; EU bucket unchanged from baseline (control).

analystPointInTime3M.note: Fully bias-free: historical analyst price targets from dated upgrades/downgrades (trailing 6M window) + EDGAR EPS. US only; EU has no Yahoo analyst coverage → control.

shortInterest3M.note: Phase 5a: crowded-short veto (SI>20% + upside<0 → -5) and squeeze bonus (SI>20% + upside>15% + mom>0 → +3). Snapshot data, not PIT.

sectorNeutral3M.note: Phase 5c: sector-neutral ranking over enrichedScore. Sectors with <5 names fall back to universe-percentile. Underlying score is orthogonal to SI/insider overlays — any delta vs baseline is pure ranking geometry.

regimeAware3M.note: Phase 5b: regime-aware score (direction-inverted). Upside and quality components scaled by REGIME_MULTIPLIERS (risk-off ×1.1/×0.9; risk-on ×0.7/×1.3). Requires regime-history.json (VIX.INDX + BAMLH0A0HYM2.FRED, 252-day rolling z).

regimeStratification3M.note: Phase 5b descriptive split: baseline enrichedScore bucketed by pivot regime (no scoring change). Gate: accept overlay only if no single regime regresses IR by ≥0.05 vs its own baseline here.

regimeVeto3M.note: Allocation-layer veto: US picks skipped on risk-off pivots (25 vetoed). Score unchanged. EU always included. Compare US IR here vs baseline to quantify the veto lift.

scoring_logic.earningsRevision: 3M EPS: >5% (+25), >0% (+12), 0% (+4), <−5% (−10) — ⚠️ look-ahead biased (current value applied to all pivots)
scoring_logic.upside: >30%(+35) >20%(+28) >15%(+20) >10%(+12) >0%(+6) neg(−15) × nAnalysts scalar — ⚠️ look-ahead biased (current targets)
scoring_logic.volEnrichment: 8×tanh((vol3M−25)/20) — pure vol signal, bias-free, up to ±8pts
scoring_logic.ffAlpha: 5×tanh(alpha3m/8) — FF6 regression on historical monthly returns, bias-free, up to ±5pts

ai_commentary:
**Backtest Summary — 2026-04-25 · 283 pivot dates · 3M primary horizon**

### Signal Validity
Analyst PIT signal (bias-free, historical targets as-of-pivot): US IR **+0.373**, hit rate 61%. This is the only honest US forward-return predictor — look-ahead fully removed.
Full-sample US 3M IR +0.373 (bias-corrected +0.195) — look-ahead lift: 0.178 IR points. EU 3M IR +0.502 (bias-corrected +0.370).
IC: US mean 0.1337 ICIR 15.3 · EU mean 0.1483 ICIR 13.1.

### Best Holding Horizon
1M: US Top10 IR +0.259 · EU Top10 IR +0.228
3M: US Top10 IR +0.373 · EU Top10 IR +0.502
6M: US Top10 IR +0.383 · EU Top10 IR +0.668
**6M EU** is the highest-conviction horizon (IR +0.668, hit rate 75%). Prefer 6M holds on EU names to reduce rebalancing friction.

### Regime Risk
⚠️  US IR collapses to **-0.248** in risk-off regimes (VIX spike / credit spread widening). The model picks the wrong stocks during macro stress. Gate: reduce or flatten US long book when 252d VIX z-score > +1.5.
Neutral regime US IR +0.561 · Risk-on +0.256 — model performs in normal and trending markets.

### Actionable Verdict
US (PIT-validated): **SOLID** — analyst PIT IR +0.373 holds out-of-sample. Tradeable with regime gate in place.
EU (6M basket): **SOLID** — bias-corrected IR +0.370. No PIT analyst time-series available yet (EODHD/Yahoo EU coverage absent); EU EPS surprise ICIR ~4 cross-validated. Start EU 6M paper trade now, size up after 6-month live track record.

*Generated by backtest engine · 2026-04-25*
